Description: Our main weekly worship service where believers gather for praise, prayer, and the preaching of God’s Word.

Day of the Week: Second  and last Sunday of every month at 04:30 PM
Description: A gathering for young people focused on worship, biblical teaching, fellowship, and spiritual growth.

Day of the Week: Second  and last Sunday of every month at 06:00 PM
Description: A sacred service where believers remember the sacrifice of Jesus Christ by partaking in the bread and cup.
A time to study and understand the Bible together and learn how to apply God’s Word in daily life.
A time dedicated to prayer and seeking God while fasting for spiritual renewal and guidance.
Recorded messages of the prophet are played for the congregation to provide spiritual teaching and encouragement.

Day of the Week: Every Friday of Month  Before the Second Saturday at 10:00 PM
Description: A special time of extended prayer and worship as the church seeks God’s presence and guidance.
